//ConnectionStrings: Set to enable the admin console + SQLite store (shared with the Runner via a volume). Without it, the sections below apply as static config.
//DependencyPilot: Watch-lists for the DependencyPilot agent. Keys must also be on the Runner's repository allowlist.
//PackageUsage: Declarative map of which repo uses which package (see ConfiguredPackageUsageScanner).
//: Watch-list for the scheduled DotNetUpgrader agent. Keys must also be on the Runner's repository allowlist.
//PipelineDoctor: Repositories whose CI PipelineDoctor watches. Per-repo CI connections (provider, URL, token env-var NAME) are managed in the admin console.
//DocScribe: Repositories whose documentation DocScribe maintains (weekly sweep + manual trigger).
//CodeReviewer: Repositories whose pull requests CodeReviewer reviews (PR-opened webhook + manual trigger).
//SplunkSentinel: Read-only Splunk observer. TokenEnvVar is the NAME of an env var on this host. No searches = the sweep is a no-op.
//ConfluenceGuide: Docs → Confluence sync planner. TokenEnvVar is the NAME of an env var on this host. No pages = the plan is a no-op.
